reviewsSummary.reviewNotes: Re-run after prior synthesis found 2 blocking issues in diagnostic-mode. fix-diagnostic-bugs (commit 0ca217b) addressed both issues.

findings.originalIssue: handleSkip had fragile async flow when skipping final question (line 425)
findings.fix: Uses sessionRef.current and finishDiagnosticRef.current() to avoid stale closure

findings.originalIssue: Remediation link construction broken at line 680 - always resolves to '#/course-map'
findings.fix: Code at lines 584 and 1195 shows correct ternary: ref.type === 'lecture' ? `#/lecture/${ref.id}` : '#/course-map'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document agent-browser commands for browser automation testing. Currently only the preview service (vite preview on port 4173) is documented, but phase3 features require browser automation via agent-browser.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Phase3 features (diagnostic-mode, drill-mode) use agent-browser for validation but services.yaml only documents preview server.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the db module location (src/lib/db.ts) and schema. Currently AGENTS.md only says 'IndexedDB via Dexie for local persistence' without specifying the path or database structure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple workers discovered db.ts through imports rather than documentation.
